title: Analytics - Firmware Update
scenario: After completing a DFU on any headset, the Firebase page displays default elements and event-specific parameters, with event counts increasing after a few hours.
steps: 1. Perform a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on any headset.
2. Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
4. Verify that the page displays the default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.

5. Verify that the page also displays the event-specific parameters: Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, and Error Description.
6. Check that the event counts for related elements have increased.
expected: The Firebase page displays all default elements and event-specific parameters. Event counts for related elements increase after a few hours following a DFU.
